name: Dried Fruit & Nut Stuffing.
recipeIngredient: 2 small cooking apples, peeled and chopped
2 oz dried prunes, no soak, chopped
2 oz dried apricots, no soak, chopped
2 oz dried peaches, no soak, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a non-stick pan and fry the onions until soft, about 5 to 8 minutes.
2. Add the apples and cook for 3 minutes. Cover and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
3. Add the remaining ingredients and cook for 5 minutes.
